visual_description: A bald man in a dark robe stands with his back to the camera, facing a blurred background of golden light. A young man with glasses and a brown jacket turns his head slightly, looking toward the right side of the frame while others in similar attire move behind him. The scene is dimly lit with a focus on the two foreground figures, their expressions and gestures partially obscured by motion or angle.
audio_description: The audio features a single, high-pitched, and fast-paced voice with a gasp.
